commit.message: Added functional validation in addition to IR validation

8278857: Compute `KnownBits` for the left shift operator

This patch enhances `LShiftNode::ValueIL()` to propagate `KnownBits`
information through left shift operations, enabling the C2 compiler to
optimize patterns like `(x << n) & (-1 << n)` to `x << n`.
Specifically, `KnownBits` now includes information that the bottom shift
bits are always zero, regardless of whether the result will overflow.
This, in turn, greatly simplifies the code in `And[IL]Node::Identity()`
by eliminating the need to check for individual patterns.  In addition
to new tests cases for the `(x << n) & (-1 << n)` pattern, this patch
also adds test cases for the previously-handled patterns so that the
lines removed by this patch do not cause a regression.
